name.description: The name of the workspace, in the format 'projects/{projectId}/locations/{location}/datasets/{datasetId}/dataMapperWorkspaces/{workspaceId}'

settings.description: Settings associated with this workspace. Structure is [documented below](#nested_settings).

data_project_ids.description: Project IDs for data projects hosted in a workspace.

dataset.description: Identifies the dataset addressed by this request. Must be in the format 'projects/{project}/locations/{location}/datasets/{dataset}'

labels.description: The user labels. An object containing a list of "key": value pairs. Example: { "name": "wrench", "mass": "1.3kg", "count": "3" } **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.
